title: Flower Power
description: Flower Power aims to implement the petal form that was/will be introduced together with the cherry blossom tree for all Vanilla flowers
body:
![Flower Power Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AnnsAnna/FlowerPower/main/.github/docs/repository-open-graph-template.png)

####  Flower Power aims to implement the petal form that was/will be introduced together with the cherry blossom tree for all Vanilla flowers.

### Crafting Recipe

To craft Petals you can use this crafting recipe (2 Flowers -> 4 Petals):

![2 Flowers -> 4 Petals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xVBqQudh/images/e4fb29a71233e41f2de0159fa7ccbfb9eb7f197d.jpeg)

To see all currently implemented flowers see: https://github.com/AnnsAnna/FlowerPower/issues/1

### Modpacks

You are allowed to share the mod in your modpacks as long as you credit me :)
